🔺 Height Hunter

Level 1
⭐ 0
🔥 0

Triangle Type

Steps

① Pick a Base Click any side of the triangle to choose it as the base.
② Draw the Height Draw a line that is the height of the triangle from that base.

Hint

Start by clicking a side of the triangle to choose the base.
💡 Use the Set Square to help draw a straight line at the right angle!
Phase 1 — Pick a Base Tries: 0

Restart Game?

All tickets, music buttons and progress will be reset. You can earn the Magic Piano again!

⟵⟶

USE THE EXTEND BASE FUNCTION TO GET THE MAGIC PIANO

An obtuse triangle has been loaded. Pick a base whose height falls outside the triangle, turn on ⟵⟶ Extend Base to see the full base line, then draw the correct height with one end touching the extended base line. The Magic Piano will unlock!
